title: Monday Music Mix #11
summary: Wow, this has been a tough one. Selecting songs, selecting art - it’s never been this difficult. I’ve tried to mix it up a bit, and sadly I’ve sort of gone with the popular route a bit. You might recognize some songs, and if you do - I apologize for failing in my attempt to introduce you to some new bits of music. At the end of the day, you win some, you lose some.
intro: Wow, this has been a tough one. Selecting songs, selecting art - it’s never been this difficult. I’ve tried to mix it up a bit, and sadly I’ve sort of gone with the popular route a bit. You might recognize some songs, and if you do - I apologize for failing in my attempt to introduce you to some new bits of music. At the end of the day, you win some, you lose some.

This week’s mix features some fantastic music - my personal favourite British sensation Ellie Goulding whose album hits US shores tomorrow, the mighty talented Adele with a cover of Cure’s Lovesong, latest from Panda Bear and more.

Next edition is going to be all about you. Suggest art, artists, tracks you like - and I’ll be sure to feature ‘em (at least try to!) Leave a comment if you’d like to collaborate. Hope you enjoy this week’s mix.
Subscribe to Monday Music Mix podcast (coming whenever I stop feeling lazy)

tracks.title: Last Night At The Jetty
tracks.displayText: Panda Bear - Last Night At The Jetty

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Eleventh

Wow, this has been a tough one. Selecting songs, selecting art - it’s never been this difficult. I’ve tried to mix it up a bit, and sadly I’ve sort of gone with the popular route a bit. You might recognize some songs, and if you do - I apologize for failing in my attempt to introduce you to some new bits of music. At the end of the day, you win some, you lose some.

This week’s mix features some fantastic music - my personal favourite British sensation Ellie Goulding whose album hits US shores tomorrow, the mighty talented Adele with a cover of Cure’s Lovesong, latest from Panda Bear and more.

Next edition is going to be all about you. Suggest art, artists, tracks you like - and I’ll be sure to feature ‘em (at least try to!)
Leave a comment if you’d like to collaborate. Hope you enjoy this week’s mix. 

Monday Music Mix: 11 (UPDATED)

Tracklist:

  1. Ellie Goulding - Guns and Horses
  2. Summer Camp - I Want You
  3. Adele - Lovesong (originally by The Cure)
  4. Panda Bear - Last Night At The Jetty
  5. Beirut - Elephant Gun
  6. Interpol - No I In Threesome
  7. The Morning Benders - Excuses

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album (zip format)

Subscribe to Monday Music Mix podcast (coming whenever I stop feeling lazy)

Listen to Grooveshark playlist *NEW*
